message:
fix(server): wrap dispatch calls in block_on for async test compatibility

Update test_notifications_return_none and test_unknown_method_returns_error
to wrap state.dispatch() calls with block_on(), matching the sync-to-async
signature change from commit c406943 which moved dispatch to spawn_blocking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
